ToolDefinition.description: A virtual tool that Claude can invoke, executed client-side rather than routing to MCP. Defines tool metadata, parameters schema, and execution behavior via handlerRef or effects array.

name.description: Snake_case tool name for Claude invocation (e.g., 'navigate_to_phase', 'highlight_element')

description.description: Documentation for Claude's tool use - explains when and how to use the tool

category.description: Tool category for organization and filtering

parameters.description: JSON Schema defining the tool's parameters interface for Claude

handlerRef.description: Key mapping to code-side handler implementation (e.g., 'navigateToPhase', 'highlightElement'). If null, effects array is used instead.

effects.description: Array of EffectDescriptor objects defining execution behavior when no handlerRef. Effects execute in sequence.

supportedContexts.description: Context identifiers where this tool is applicable (e.g., ['discovery', 'implementation', 'all'])

ToolRegistry.description: A tool registry that groups ToolBindings with inheritance support. Child registries inherit parent bindings with child-first priority.

description.description: Documentation for the registry's purpose and scope

extends.description: Parent registry for inheritance chain (child bindings take priority)

fallbackBehavior.description: Behavior when no bindings match: passthrough (send to MCP), error (fail), ignore (silent no-op)

bindings.description: Computed inverse: all ToolBindings pointing to this registry

ToolBinding.description: Binds a ToolDefinition to a ToolRegistry via a MongoDB-style context match expression. Determines when a tool is available based on ChatContext.

registry.description: The registry this binding belongs to

tool.description: The tool to make available when this binding matches

contextMatch.description: MongoDB-style query evaluated against ChatContext (e.g., {phase: 'implementation', projectTier: 'internal'})

defaultConfig.description: Default ToolConfig applied when this binding matches (timeout, animation, duration, blocking, dismissible)

enabled.description: Whether this binding is active. Disabled bindings are excluded from resolution.

StateActionBinding.description: Bridges virtual tools to MST domain actions. Maps tool-friendly exposedAs names to actual domain/model/action paths with parameter mapping and guard evaluation.

domain.description: Schema/domain name where the action lives (e.g., 'platform-features', 'component-builder', 'studio-core')

action.description: MST action name on the entity (e.g., 'advancePhase', 'updateDefaultConfig', 'updateSettings')

parameterSchema.description: JSON Schema defining expected parameters for this action binding

guards.description: MongoDB-style query for context-based access control (e.g., {userRole: {$in: ['owner', 'admin']}})
